raw_title: United in Difficult Times? Investigating Party Communication on EU Solidarity
title_en: United in Difficult Times? Investigating Party Communication on EU Solidarity
title_zh: 困难时期团结一致？调查政党关于欧盟团结的沟通
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在困难时期，欧洲政党如何沟通和讨论欧盟团结的问题。它关注政党如何表达对团结的支持或反对，以及这些沟通如何影响公众对欧盟的看法。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how European political parties communicate and discuss EU solidarity during difficult times. It focuses on how parties express support or opposition to solidarity, and how this communication affects public perceptions of the EU.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注欧盟政治沟通、政党话语和危机时期的团结动态，旨在理解沟通如何塑造欧盟的凝聚力和政策支持。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on EU political communication, party discourse, and solidarity dynamics during crises, aiming to understand how communication shapes EU cohesion and policy support.
